articles.title: Gaudreau honored by Team USA after gold medal win at Olympics - NHL.com
articles.description: Players skate with jersey of American forward who died in 2024, take photo with children
articles.content:
Johnny Gaudreau was on the minds of Team USA throughout the mens hockey tournament at the Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026.
Forward Matthew Tkachuk and defenseman Zach Werenski skated around… [+985 chars]
